snippet.title: Street Fighter | Official Trailer (2026 Movie)
snippet.description:
FIGHT! Watch the Official Trailer for #StreetFighterMovie, hitting theaters everywhere October 16.  

Set in 1993, estranged Street Fighters Ryu (Andrew Koji) and Ken Masters (Noah Centineo) are thrown back into combat when the mysterious Chun-Li (Callina Liang) recruits them for the next World Warrior Tournament: a brutal clash of fists, fate, and fury. But behind this battle royale lies a deadly conspiracy that forces them to face off against each other and the demons of their past. And if they don’t, it’s GAME OVER!

Helmed by director Kitao Sakurai, Street Fighter is set to bring the battle from the arcade to the big screen with Hadoukens, roundhouses, and all your favorite characters.

snippet.title: Pag ibig ay Kanibalismo II - fitterkarma (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Pag ibig ay Kanibalismo II - fitterkarma (Lyrics)

Lyrics :

[Verse 1]
Tayo'y mag momotor
Sa mga kalsada ng Siquijor
At magsigawan tayo
Na parang nasa horror
Tayo’y magkatay ng tao
Sabay isalang at i-adobo
Huwag ka lang magsabi ng totoo

[Chorus]
Ibabalik kita nang buong-buo
Pangako 'yun sa'yo
Sa’yo lang ang puso ko
Kahit kainin mo

[Verse 2]
Magdodroga tayo
Kimi lang, bawal 'yon (Kimi lang, bawal 'yon)
'Di ako masamang tao
Pumapatay lang ako
Ng kalungkutan ko
Pati ng sa'yo

[Chorus]
Ibabalik kita nang buong-buo
Pangako 'yun sa'yo
Sa'yo lang ang puso ko
Kahit kainin mo

[Bridge]
At hahalik ka nang may lipstick na dugo
Sa labi kong punong-puno ng panlasa ko sa’yo

[Outro]
Kanibalismo, ’di ka matiis
Kapag inalis mo, ika'y mamimiss
’Di nagmamalinis
O ika'y mamimiss
'Di ka matitiis
Tatlo na sais
Pag-ibig mong kay tamis

snippet.title: Tarzan: Live Action - (2026) | Chris Hemsworth, Amanda Seyfried | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#Tarzan #ChrisHemsworth #ConceptTrailer

Watch This Tarzan Live Action Fan-Made Concept Trailer

What if the legendary king of the jungle swung back onto the big screen with Chris Hemsworth embodying the raw power and primal grace of Tarzan? This concept trailer reimagines the classic tale with breathtaking jungle landscapes, visceral action sequences, and a deeply emotional story of a man torn between two worlds. Amanda Seyfried brings new life to Jane Porter while Arnold Schwarzenegger commands the screen in a role that adds unexpected intensity to this wild adventure. Every scene was crafted to honor the timeless legacy while pushing the story into bold new territory.

The storyboard and all visuals in this trailer were personally created by me as a passionate "What If" project exploring a modern Tarzan adaptation. I envisioned Hemsworth channeling the untamed spirit of a man raised among apes, connecting with audiences through both heart and spectacle. From thundering elephant stampedes to intimate moments beneath the jungle canopy, this concept captures the adventure and wonder that made Tarzan an enduring icon. This is my personal love letter to one of fiction's greatest heroes and the incredible cast I dream could bring him to life.

Disclaimer: This is a fan-made concept trailer and a personal "What If" creative project. It is not affiliated with Edgar Rice Burroughs Inc., Warner Bros., Disney, or any official Tarzan production. All storyboard work and visuals were independently created by me for entertainment purposes only.



Along with fan-made trailers, I also share movie reviews, news, and updates from the world of entertainment. Be sure to hit that subscribe button and stay updated on all the latest from my channel!

snippet.description:
พีท (นานิ หิรัญกฤษฎิ์) ชายหนุ่มผู้อับโชคซึ่งมีเศษวิญญาณปีศาจอยู่ในตัว ทำให้สัมผัสได้ถึง เหยาพลังงานประหลาดที่ออกมากลืนกินพลังชีวิตของผู้คน จึงได้พบกับ นิรันดร์ (สกาย วงศ์รวี) ชายหนุ่มที่นำพาให้เขาเข้าไปในโลกแห่ง “อู” ทั้งสองได้กลายเป็นคู่หูจำเป็นและได้รวบรวมทีมเพื่อร่วมกันปราบเหยาและปัดเป่าสิ่งชั่วร้าย!

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: Air Supply — All Out Of Love (Sub. Español)
snippet.description:
🎙️ Artista | Air Supply
💿 Canción | All Out Of Love
📅 Fecha de Lanzamiento | 07/02/1980
📻 Géneros Musicales | Pop, Rock

✨ Acerca de la Canción:
“All Out of Love” de Air Supply es una confesión dolorosa sobre el arrepentimiento y la desesperación que llega cuando una relación se rompe y el amor parece haberse agotado. A través de versos íntimos y un coro inolvidable, la canción retrata a alguien que reconoce demasiado tarde sus errores, atrapado entre la soledad, la culpa y la esperanza de poder recuperar a quien perdió.

📲 Sígue a "Air Supply" en:
▶️ YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@AirSupplyMusicOfficial

🪩 [ Letra / Lyrics ] 🪩

[Verse 1]
I'm lyin' alone with my head on the phone
Thinkin' of you till it hurts
I know you're hurt too, but what else can we do
Tormented and torn apart
I wish I could carry your smile in my heart
For times when my life seems so low
It would make me believe what tomorrow could bring
When today doesn't really know
Doesn't really know

[Chorus]
I'm all out of love
I'm so lost without you
I know you were right
Believing for so long
I'm all out of love
What am I without you?
I can't be too late
To say that I was so wrong

[Verse 2]
I want you to come back and carry me home
Away from these long, lonely nights
I'm reaching for you, are you feeling it too
Does the feeling seem oh so right

There's no easy way, it gets harder each day
Please love me or I'll be gone
I'll be gone

Was there a lifetime waiting for us
In a world where I was yours?

To the warmth we had before

Say the word, I'll drive in reverse
I would spend a lifetime waiting for you

Just to go back to the way we were before

Giving in a little more?
To the warmth we had before

All this time, I have been yours

This video took place on a private modded Minecraft server, where we all were somewhat roleplaying! In this SMP, I, Bionic, had my Hero Suit. For the superhero secret base, I had it mapped out since the start of the server and even had most of it built on a private world. This made it easy to build, but still took me over 6 hours with some breaks... The boys and I agreed they'd attack once I was done to make the content and experience more fun, otherwise I would've been cooked hahaha. Hope you guys enjoyed!

snippet.title: BINI | ‘Blush’ Official Music Video
snippet.description:
#BINI : “Blush” is an anthem for a summer-crush about that heart-racing feeling when someone special walks in the room. It’s playful, bright, and instantly addictive. It's the sound of butterflies in song form. The track blends breezy pop energy with feel-good rhythm, wrapping up the joy, tension, and euphoria when your crush looks at you, and you just can't help but blush back.

#BINI_Blush, and the entire #BINI_Signals EP, is now on all platforms: https://orcd.co/bini_signalsep 

If you like our videos, don't forget to subscribe to our channel - http://bit.ly/BINIPH
